The assignment

Questions & Sample Answers

Question 1

[1] "Since when have people been wearing makeup?"
 [1] The first traces of makeup were found in Ancient Egypt, as people of all genders used it for various purposes.
 [2] People have been wearing makeup since ancient times, including in Ancient Egypt and Ancient Greece.           
 [3]                                                                                                               
 [4] Since ancient Egypt.                                                                                          
 [5] Since ancient Egypt.                                                                                          
 [6] People have been wearing up since ancient Egypt.                                                              
 [7]                                                                                                               
 [8] People have been wearing makeup for thousands of years, since ancient civilizations such as Ancient Egypt.    
 [9] Since ancient Egypt.                                                                                          
[10] A1.People have been wearing makeup since Ancient Egypt.                                                       
7 Levels:  ... The first traces of makeup were found in Ancient Egypt, as people of all genders used it for various purposes.

Question 2

[1] "What was the purpose of wearing makeup in the Middle Ages?"
 [1] In lower classes or sex workers, women put darker colours on their eyes and lips to attract customers. In higher classes, not only women but also men set loose powder in order to reveal the difference between high and low classes.                                                                                                                              
 [2] To distinguish between class and social status.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     
 [3] In the Middle Ages, makeup was used to show differences of classes and social status.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               
 [4]                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     
 [5] The purpose is showing class and social statues.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    
 [6] People wear makeup to differentiate class and status.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               
 [7] To show social status or class.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     
 [8] To show the difference between lower class and upper class. Rich people used white powder to show they didn’t work outside.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         
 [9] In the Middle Ages, makeup was used to differentiate class and status. Lower class women and sex workers would use dark colors on both eyes and lips mimicking signs of sexual arousal and attracting literal customers, while higher class women and some men would use ceruse powder to get a very fair complexion to distinguish themselves from working outside.
[10] To express the differences of class or social-states.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               
10 Levels:  ...

Question 3

[1] "What are some negative effects of wearing makeup?"
 [1] Wearing makeup can cause stress, anxiety,and low self-esteem.                                                                                                                   
 [2] Posts on social media make people’s mental worse because they will change the standard of beauty.                                                                               
 [3] People worry about the sexualization and the environmental print of cosmetics.                                                                                                  
 [4] Answer 3: social media and advertisement                                                                                                                                        
 [5]                                                                                                                                                                                 
 [6] Makeup can sometimes lower self-esteem and create pressure to look “perfect.” Social media and beauty standards may also lead to anxiety, insecurity, and unhealthy comparisons.
 [7] Wearing makeup causes low self-esteem, deep dependence on makeup and pressure.                                                                                                  
 [8] There is mental health and extreme promotion of beauty by the media.                                                                                                            
 [9] A3.Wearing makeup can cause low self-esteem, anxiety, depression, and pressure to look perfect.                                                                                 
[10] Makeup causes low self-worth and self-confidence, bad influence on physical and mental health.                                                                                  
10 Levels:  ...

Question 4:

[1] "What is a healthy use of wearing makeup?"
 [1]                                                                                                                                                                                          
 [2] Use it to celebrate who you are instead of trying to hide what you look like, and encourage companies that have a positive impact.                                                       
 [3] Who you are is very important so you can celebrate yourself.                                                                                                                             
 [4]                                                                                                                                                                                          
 [5] A healthy use of wearing makeup is to express yourself and natural beauty.                                                                                                               
 [6] A healthy use of makeup is using it for self-expression,confidence, and creativity instead of trying to satisfy society’s beauty standards.                                              
 [7] Fenty, which is a cosmetic company, makes a variety of foundation colors, as a result, this company encourages all the women and celebrities to dare to bare to demystify natural beauty.
 [8] Using it for self expression and creativity, not because of pressure.                                                                                                                    
 [9] To fun makeup and celebrate who you are.                                                                                                                                                 
[10] A healthy use of makeup is using it for self expression, creativity, and confidence, not to hide who you are.                                                                            
9 Levels:  ...

Question 5:

[1] "What advice does the speaker give to the audience at the end of her speech?"
 [1] Try to love your natural face and be confident.                                                                                                                                               
 [2] It is to join and be part of a natural makeup event.                                                                                                                                          
 [3] Taking a photo of ourselves and sharing it on social media.                                                                                                                                   
 [4] The speaker encourages people to feel confident both with and without makeup and to use makeup to celebrate themselves rather than hide who they are.                                         
 [5] Let's start on a social media challenge. Take to selfie one with and one without makeup Share them on social media with the hashtag and tell us why you feel confident with all without makeup
 [6]                                                                                                                                                                                               
 [7] To take selfies, one with and one without makeup to promote healthy use.                                                                                                                      
 [8] Let’s start on a social media challenge.                                                                                                                                                      
 [9] Taking two photos, one with and one without makeup, and sharing social media.                                                                                                                 
[10] She said people should feel confident with or without makeup.                                                                                                                                 
10 Levels:  ... Try to love your natural face and be confident.


Summaries

five sample summaries

[1] This speech talks about the history and effects of makeup. People have used makeup since ancient Egypt. In that era, people of all genders wore makeup for various reasons. In the Middle Ages, makeup used to show social status. Today, many people wore makeup to look for empowerment. However, makeup also creates pressure to look perfect. Because social media advertise the same beauty standard and people depend on their appearance. The speaker says, the important thing is to use makeup in a healthy way and not depend on it too much for confidence and we should have more confidence in our natural beauty. And she encourages the audience to value themselves and people should remember that true beauty comes from inside.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   
[2] In this TED Talk,she discusses how makeup affects mental health and self-image. She explains that makeup has existed since ancient times and has been used for many purposes, including beauty, social status, and self-expression. Today, however, social media has greatly influenced beauty standards. Platforms such as Instagram and TikTok constantly show edited and idealized images, which can make people feel insecure about their appearance. The speaker points out that this pressure may negatively affect mental health and self-esteem, especially among young people. At the same time, she does not argue that makeup itself is bad. Instead, she says makeup can be positive when it is used creatively and for self-expression. She encourages people to feel confident both with and without makeup. The talk ultimately emphasizes the importance of self-acceptance and developing confidence that is not completely dependent on appearance or social approval.                                                                                             
[3] She asked us the question: why do we do make up? It may be demanded by someone, society including employees and customers, or for ourselves to make up. We can promote our confidence by self advertisement and self identity through wearing make up. Social media and companies affect our beauties and our mental health. Makeup has started since Ancient Egypt. In that time, both men and women do make up to express differences between each other. However, the meaning of make- up is changed from time to time. Until the 20th century, it expressed the differences of class and social states. People choose the color based on their class or kinds of jobs to fit their working. All of us are able to use makeup because the cosmetics industry was developed and express our identities easily. She is concerned that the age of starting makeup is getting younger and younger because children are interested in beauties and have bad effects such as mental problems and eating disorders. She advised us that if we wear makeup, we should celebrate ourselves.
[4]                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      
[5] Makeup has started since ancient ages, and makeup in this age's purpose is to express their social status. Nowadays, makeup is consumed as a business, and social media by influencers. Speakers said concerns about makeup are increasing. Give an example of mental health and extreme promotion of beauty by the media. Finally she told the recent movement of makeup that cosmetics companies started to sell various color foundations, and no makeup promotion.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               
5 Levels:  ...

What was the longest string of words shared among the students’ summaries and transcript?

1 use it to celebrate who you are instead of trying to hide what you look like
  count
1     2
Comment: It’s a nice chunk of English; Easy to remember. More difficult to paraphrase.

word count for summary


Opinions

five sample opinions

[1] I think that makeup is important for our health. It is because I have heard that it is hard to get dementia. She said that "these days, makeup companies sell many colour types of foundations. I think it is a good attempt. In particular, extreme skin colours like black or white are difficult to find foundations which look like their own skin colours. Makeup affects good thinking, so I think it is good that we start wearing makeup when we are young.                                                           
[2] I think makeup is a decoration with a face so that I can get knowledge about makeup. The speaker said,I don’t think it can be anything wrong with the human face. This word is very hopeful. I often heard people say lookism negatively affects someone’s mental health, especially self confidence, so this word should spread to people.                                                                                                                                                                                   
[3] I think makeup is essential for today's young women. They get confidence from makeup and they enjoy their daily lives. Also I’m so too. However, these days, some people rely on makeup and get skin ill or have been criticised. If they can't put on makeup, they can’t feel confident. I can understand it, however, I think everyone has something good on their own faces. So makeup should be used to change our feelings. Enjoy daily lives is important, but also important to protect skin and protect healthy lives.
[4]                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               
[5]                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               
4 Levels:  ...
